about.title: About Medlink
about.subtitle: Medlink is Ethiopia's modern digital healthcare platform that connects patients with verified doctors, making healthcare accessible, fast, and reliable for everyone.
about.story1: Medlink was created in response to the challenges of fragmented healthcare access in Ethiopia, where patients often struggle to find the right specialists, book appointments, and access timely care.
about.story2: As a team of five Software Engineering graduates, we came together with a shared vision to build a unified digital healthcare system that simplifies doctor discovery, appointment booking, and remote consultations.

features.title: Cross-Platform App
features.desc: Built with React Native and Expo, running seamlessly on iOS, Android, and Web from a single codebase.

features.title: Robust Backend
features.desc: A Django REST Framework API powers secure authentication, appointment management, and doctor data handling.

features.title: Doctor Verification
features.desc: A multi-step verification process ensures all doctors are licensed, authenticated, and trusted.

features.title: Online Consultations
features.desc: Secure video and messaging features allow patients to consult doctors remotely.

features.title: Smart Reminders
features.desc: Automated reminders and notifications help patients stay updated with appointments.

features.title: Payment Integration
features.desc: Secure and seamless payments powered by Chapa.

about.teamIntro: Five Software Engineering graduates who turned a shared vision into a working digital healthcare platform.

team.name: Bemnet Beyene
team.desc: Specializes in React Native and modern mobile UI development with a focus on usability and performance.

team.name: Birtukan Kussa
team.desc: Focused on UX design, component architecture, and building intuitive user experiences.

team.name: Betelhem Seleshi
team.desc: Passionate about testing, accessibility, and building visually polished UI systems.

team.name: Beni Fessiha
team.desc: Specializes in API design, system architecture, and scalable backend development.

team.name: Bekalu Bekele
team.desc: Focused on database design, server infrastructure, and backend optimization.

about.missionBody: To make quality healthcare accessible to every Ethiopian through technology — removing barriers of distance, cost, and complexity so healthcare becomes simple and reachable for all.
